articles.headline: Acme Manufacturing opens new Sheffield facility, creating 120 jobs
articles.summary: Acme Manufacturing announced a £12m investment in a new Sheffield production facility, expected to be operational by Q4 2026. The expansion follows strong order book growth in the automotive components segment.

articles.headline: UK tech SMEs face headwinds as VC funding falls 18% in Q1 2026
articles.summary: Sector-wide report on declining venture capital investment affecting UK technology small and medium enterprises. No specific mention of TechVentures Digital.

articles.headline: TechVentures Digital secures £500k seed extension from existing investors
articles.summary: TechVentures Digital has secured a £500,000 seed extension round from its existing investor syndicate to fund product development through H1 2026.

C002.note: Negative sector article does not name TechVentures Digital specifically. Company-specific news is positive (funding secured).

articles.headline: GreenLeaf Retail Group issues profit warning citing falling footfall and rising costs
articles.summary: GreenLeaf Retail Group issued a profit warning for FY2026, citing a 14% decline in footfall across its 45 stores and a 9% rise in energy and logistics costs. Management flagged potential need to close underperforming locations.

articles.headline: Three UK retail chains collapse in Q1 2026 amid cost-of-living crisis
articles.summary: Sector-level analysis of retail failures. GreenLeaf is mentioned as one of several chains facing 'significant financial pressure' in the current environment.

articles.headline: GreenLeaf CEO steps down unexpectedly — CFO assumes interim role
articles.summary: GreenLeaf Retail Group announced the immediate departure of CEO Sandra Walsh. CFO David Park has been appointed as interim CEO while the board conducts a formal search. No reason given for the departure.

articles.headline: UK logistics sector reports improved on-time delivery rates in 2026
articles.summary: Industry-wide improvement in supply chain performance. BlueSky Logistics cited among firms benefiting from reduced port congestion and improved driver availability. Sector-wide on-time delivery rates up to 94%.

C005.note: No significant news coverage in the past 30 days.
